creator: jarrod@downtools.com.au
text:
Hi Doug,

I am a little lost as the issue, the nrpe2 binary is installed as a part =
of the net-mgmt/nrpe2 port and not net-mgmt/nagios-plugins.  As a part =
of the installation process of that port, the nagios user and group is =
created in the same way it is on the net-mgmt/nagios port.  If you have =
any console output or a list of commands run on a fresh system, I would =
be happy to test further.

Cheers,
Jarrod.=
